definition: Contemplation of felt experience in the satipaṭṭhāna framework.
notes: Use this record for the felt-experience branch of satipaṭṭhāna. Keep it aligned with the stable vedanā headword policy and avoid slipping back into generic feeling-language when the immediate affective tone is what matters.

example_phrases.translation: one remains observing felt experience in relation to felt experience
example_phrases.notes: Standard satipaṭṭhāna formula aligned with the repo's vedanā policy.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use for the felt-experience branch of satipaṭṭhāna in governed practice contexts.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not let emotion-language or generic neutral-feeling language take over when the entry is being used to govern direct vedanā practice.
